headline: Ethereum Quantum-Proofs Cost 7 Cents Per Account

article.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
article.summary: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.

headline: $36M Crypto Heist Linked to North Korean Hackers

article.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
article.summary: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

headline: Lazard Wins $5B Venezuela Deal, Beats Centerview

article.title: Lazard Undercuts Rival Centerview in Battle for Venezuela Deal
article.summary: Investment bank Lazard Inc. is making a late bid to dislodge rival Centerview Partners as Venezuela’s financial adviser, offering to oversee one of the largest-ever sovereign debt restructurings for a sharply lower fee.

headline: $100M Bailout Nears for Distressed African Sugar Mills

article.title: IDC, Vision Near Deal to Save Century-Old African Sugar Mills
article.summary: Tycoon-backed Vision Group is in talks with South Africa’s Industrial Development Corp. to take an equity stake in sugar refiner Tongaat Hulett in exchange for additional funding, Vision Group shareholder and consortium member Robert Gumede said in an interview.

headline: $1B Pokémon Card Sales Spike on Crypto Exchanges

headline: Trump Backs $1M UFC Bonus in USD1 Stablecoin

article.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.

headline: Venice, Morpheus Tokens Surge 15% on Fable 5 Ban
